# LOSO MOBILE

LOSO MOBILE is a budget-friendly mobile services provider targeting foreign workers in Israel, particularly the Thai community. The brand focuses on affordability and accessibility, offering SIM cards, phone top-ups, and money transfers to Thailand. The tone is practical and community-oriented, designed to serve a specific immigrant worker demographic with straightforward, cost-effective telecom solutions.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Affordable Mobile Plans for Israel&#39;s Thai Workers — LOSO MOBILE

URL: https://example.com
Description: LOSO MOBILE delivers cheap SIM cards, easy top-ups, and fast money transfers to Thailand. Join the mobile telecommunication company built for your budget and community.

Affordable Mobile Plans for Israel's Thai Workers — LOSO MOBILE

## שירותי LOSO MOBILE


הפתרונות המשתלמים ביותר לעובדים זרים בישראל – טעינות, סים והעברות כספים לתאילנד, הכל במקום אחד.











### טעינות סלולריות


טען את הנייד שלך במהירות ובזול. מבצעים יומיים, חבילות גלישה משתלמות, ושירות לקוחות בעברית ותאית – כדי שתישאר מחובר למשפחה בכל רגע.


לטעינה מהירה











### כרטיסי SIM


קבל סים ישראלי מותאם לעובדים זרים. ללא התחייבות, עם מספר מקומי, חבילות גלישה נדיבות ושיחות לתאילנד במחיר ללא תחרות.


להזמנת סים










### העברות כספים לתאילנד


שלח כסף הביתה בבטחה ובעמלות הכי נמוכות. שער יציב, העברה מהירה, וקבלה נוחה בתאילנד – כדי שהמשפחה שלך תקבל יותר.


להעברה מיידית

















## Why LOSO MOBILE?


We keep things simple and affordable. No hidden fees, no confusing plans — just reliable mobile service and easy money transfers, built for the way you work and connect with family back home.


- ### Lowest Prices, Guaranteed We compare rates daily so you always get the best deal on top-ups and transfers to Thailand.

- ### Instant Activation Your SIM or top-up is ready in seconds. No waiting, no paperwork — just scan, pay, and go.

- ### Community Support We speak your language and understand your needs. Friendly help whenever you need it.

- ### Secure Money Transfers Send money home safely with trusted partners. Track every transaction in real-time.

























Testimonials


## Trusted by the Community


Hear from workers and employers who rely on LOSO MOBILE for affordable SIMs, easy top-ups, and fast money transfers to Thailand.












"The cheapest SIM and top-up I've found in Israel. I save money every month and can call my family in Thailand without worrying."

— affordable & reliable


Somsak P.
Agricultural Worker, Arava










"Topping up my phone takes less than a minute with LOSO. The website is clear, even with my basic Hebrew. Highly recommended."

— fast & simple


Niran K.
Factory Worker, Petah Tikva










"Sending money to my wife in Bangkok is stress-free now. The rates are fair and the transfer arrives quickly. True peace of mind."

— peace of mind


Chaiwat S.
Caregiver, Tel Aviv

Get Help Choosing

## Send Money Home &amp; Recharge Instantly — LOSO MOBILE

URL: https://example.com/services
Description: Explore budget-friendly mobile services from top-ups to Thailand money transfers. LOSO MOBILE is the mobile telecommunication company that keeps you connected for less.

Send Money Home & Recharge Instantly — LOSO MOBILE

# LOSO MOBILE


טעינות · SIM · העברות לתאילנד


The most affordable top-up site for foreign workers in Israel. LOSO MOBILE is your trusted mobile telecommunication company, delivering straightforward, budget-friendly mobile services designed specifically for the Thai community and all foreign workers who need reliable connectivity and fast money transfers back home.










### SIM Cards


Affordable prepaid SIMs with generous data packages, activated instantly for your convenience.








### Phone Top-Ups


Fast, low-cost recharges for all Israeli and international networks. Top up in seconds, stay connected always.








### Transfers to Thailand


Secure, low-fee money transfers directly to Thailand, helping you support your family back home with ease.















## Everything You Need, All in One Place


Simple, affordable, and reliable mobile services designed for the way you live and work in Israel. We make staying connected to Thailand easy and stress-free.









### Phone Top-Ups


Instantly recharge your Israeli SIM or send credit to a family member's phone back home. No hidden fees, no complicated steps — just fast, reliable top-ups.



Best rates for all major Israeli networks


Instant delivery directly to your phone


Multiple payment options available










### SIM Activation & Support


Get your new LOSO MOBILE SIM card activated quickly with our dedicated support team. We'll guide you through every step in your language, so you're never left confused.



Free activation with every new SIM purchase


Thai-speaking customer support


Keep your number when you switch










### Money Transfers to Thailand


Send money home safely and affordably. Our transfer service is built specifically for the Thai community in Israel, offering competitive exchange rates and low fees.



Low transfer fees compared to banks


Fast processing to major Thai banks


Secure transactions every time















## การเริ่มต้นใช้งานง่ายๆ ใน 4 ขั้นตอน


เราทำให้การเชื่อมต่อสื่อสารและบริการมือถือเป็นเรื่องง่าย ไม่ยุ่งยาก เพื่อให้คุณเชื่อมต่อได้ทันที





1



### ติดต่อเรา


ส่งข้อความทาง WhatsApp หรือโทรหาเราได้ทันที เราพูดภาษาไทยได้ครับ





2



### รับคำแนะนำ


เราจะช่วยเลือกแพ็คเกจที่เหมาะกับคุณที่สุด ไม่มีค่าบริการแฝง





3



### เลือกบริการ


SIM, เติมเงิน, หรือโอนเงินไปไทย ทุกอย่างรวมอยู่ในที่เดียว





4



### ใช้งานได้ทันที


เริ่มใช้งานได้ทันที พร้อมทีมงานช่วยเหลือตลอดการใช้งาน





เราพร้อมช่วยคุณทุกขั้นตอน ไม่มีค่าธรรมเนียมแฝง ไม่มีสัญญาผูกมัด เพียงแค่ติดต่อเราแล้วปล่อยให้เราดูแล












## Simple, Affordable Mobile That Works for You


LOSO MOBILE cuts through the complexity. We deliver straightforward, budget-friendly SIM cards, top-ups, and money transfers designed specifically for foreign workers in Israel. No hidden fees, no confusing contracts — just reliable connection to keep you close to family and work.


Get Your SIM Today












### Best Prices, Guaranteed


We negotiate the lowest rates so you pay less. Save money on every top-up and transfer compared to traditional mobile providers.









### No Hidden Surprises


What you see is what you pay. Clear terms, instant activation, and full transparency on every transaction.









### Support in Your Language


Our team speaks your language. Get help with setup, top-ups, and transfers without the language barrier.
















## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about staying connected with LOSO MOBILE. From SIM activation to sending money home, we make it simple and affordable for the Thai community in Israel.











### Who is LOSO MOBILE for?


LOSO MOBILE is designed specifically for foreign workers in Israel, with a special focus on the Thai community. Our services are built around your needs: affordable communication, easy top-ups, and reliable money transfers to Thailand.









### How do I get a SIM card?


Getting started is easy. Simply contact us through our website or visit one of our partner locations. We offer prepaid SIM cards with no contracts, no hidden fees, and instant activation so you can start calling Thailand right away.









### What makes LOSO MOBILE different?


We are the most affordable mobile service provider for foreign workers in Israel. Unlike big telecom companies, we focus exclusively on what you need: low-cost calls to Thailand, cheap data packages, and the best exchange rates for money transfers.









### How fast is the money transfer to Thailand?


Transfers through LOSO MOBILE are processed quickly, often within minutes. We partner with trusted financial services to ensure your money reaches family in Thailand safely and with minimal fees, so more of your hard-earned money goes home.









### Do you have customer support in Thai?


Yes! We provide customer support in Thai language because we understand how important it is to communicate comfortably. Our team speaks Thai and is ready to help you with any questions about your mobile service or money transfers.









### Can I keep my existing phone number?


In most cases, yes. We can help you port your existing Israeli number to LOSO MOBILE so you don't lose your contacts. The process is straightforward, and our support team will guide you through every step.







Still have questions? We're here to help you get connected.


Contact Us














Affordable mobile connectivity for foreign workers in Israel. Stay close to home with reliable SIMs, top-ups, and international transfers.

## Your Community-First Mobile Network in Israel — LOSO MOBILE

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Discover why LOSO MOBILE exists: to give foreign workers straightforward, low-cost t mobile telecommunications. Learn how we put the Thai community at the heart of every plan.

Your Community-First Mobile Network in Israel — LOSO MOBILE












































Skip to main content

















- Products Products







- Home

- About

0













Products














# Our Story: Why LOSO MOBILE Exists


At LOSO MOBILE, we understand the challenges of living and working far from home. Founded to serve the vibrant community of foreign workers in Israel, we saw a critical gap: affordable, reliable mobile services and a simple way to stay connected with loved ones in Thailand. Traditional telecom plans often come with hidden fees and complex contracts that don't fit the needs of hardworking people sending money home.


That's why we built LOSO MOBILE — a mobile telecommunication company dedicated to making communication and financial support as straightforward and budget-friendly as possible. From prepaid SIM cards that work instantly to quick phone top-ups and secure money transfers to Thailand, every service is designed with your wallet and your family in mind. We believe staying connected shouldn't be a luxury; it's a necessity that should be accessible to everyone.


Get Started with LOSO MOBILE
























## เป้าหมายของเรา — Our Mission


We exist to make staying connected simple, affordable, and reliable for every foreign worker in Israel. No hidden fees, no confusing plans — just the services you need to reach home.











### Affordability First


We deliver the lowest-cost mobile services in Israel so you can save more for what matters most.









### Total Transparency


Every plan is explained in simple terms so you always know exactly what you're paying for.









### Always Reliable


Our network ensures you stay connected anytime, anywhere across Israel without interruptions.









### Community Driven


Designed for the Thai community in Israel, with services and support that understand your unique needs.

























## Built for the Community, Priced for You


LOSO MOBILE understands the unique needs of foreign workers in Israel. We provide affordable, reliable mobile telecommunication services designed specifically for the Thai community — keeping you connected to family, work, and opportunities back home without breaking the bank.








### Direct Thailand Transfers


Send money home instantly with the best exchange rates and lowest fees, directly from your phone.










### Affordable SIM & Top-Ups


Budget-friendly prepaid plans with generous data, calls, and international minutes tailored for workers.










### Community-First Support


Multilingual customer care that speaks your language and understands your needs as a foreign worker.







"LOSO MOBILE is the most affordable mobile telecommunication company for workers who need dependable, low-cost connectivity every day."

















What Our Community Says


## Trusted by workers, families, and employers across Israel


Real stories from people who rely on LOSO MOBILE every day for affordable calls, data, and transfers home.










I send money to my family in Thailand every month, and LOSO MOBILE makes it simple and cheap. The rates are the best I've found, and I never worry about hidden fees. My wife receives the money within minutes.





Somchai P.
Construction Worker, Tel Aviv









As an employer, I need my team to stay connected. LOSO MOBILE's group top-up plans save us money and keep everyone happy. Reliable coverage and excellent support.





Avi Cohen
Farm Owner, Arava









I was paying too much for calls to Thailand. A friend told me about LOSO MOBILE. Now I talk to my parents every day without thinking about the bill. The SIM was ready in minutes.





Nong K.
Caregiver, Haifa









My husband works in Israel, and I manage the money here in Thailand. LOSO MOBILE's transfer service is a lifeline for our family. It's fast, secure, and the exchange rate is always fair. We trust them completely.





Mali S.
Homemaker, Bangkok








Join thousands of satisfied customers who save every day.

Get Your SIM Today

# We're Here to Help You Stay Connected


Ask us about top-ups, SIM cards, and money transfers to Thailand. LOSO MOBILE makes it easy and affordable for foreign workers in Israel.








### Call Us


Speak directly with our support team for quick help with top-ups and plans.

[business_phone]






### Message Us


Reach out via WhatsApp or our contact form for questions about transfers and SIM delivery.








### Service Assistance


Need help with your account, international calling, or finding a store? We'll guide you.

## Simple Support, Clear Answers


We understand you need fast, reliable help. Our team will guide you to the best mobile service for your needs.



- ### Quick Response We typically reply within a few hours during business days.


- ### Trusted Service Serving the community with affordable, reliable mobile solutions.


- ### Expert Guidance Not sure which plan is right for you? We'll help you choose.






[business_email]



[business_phone]

















## Serving Foreign Workers Across Israel


LOSO MOBILE is the trusted mobile telecommunication company for the Thai community and foreign workers throughout Israel. From the northern borders to the southern desert, we keep you connected with affordable SIM cards, instant top-ups, and secure money transfers to Thailand.








### Nationwide Coverage


Reliable signal and service available in all major cities, agricultural areas, and industrial zones where foreign workers live and work.









### Thailand Transfer Support


Send money home easily with dedicated transfer services designed for the Thai community. Fast, secure, and integrated with your mobile account.





























## Need help? We're here for you


Get fast, affordable support from LOSO MOBILE. Our team understands your needs and speaks your language.


Contact Us Now

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - LOSO MOBILE




































































- Products Products







- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact
0













Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/16/2026



At LOSO MOBILE, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/16/2026



LOSO MOBILE ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: LOSO MOBILE

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice















Affordable mobile connectivity for foreign workers in Israel. Stay close to home with reliable SIMs, top-ups, and international transfers.

## Accessibility Statement

Products











# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 16, 2026



LOSO MOBILE is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: LOSO MOBILE

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Affordable mobile connectivity for foreign workers in Israel. Stay close to home with reliable SIMs, top-ups, and international transfers.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 16, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - LOSO MOBILE

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Telecommunications / Mobile Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


LOSO MOBILE provides Telecommunications / Mobile Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by LOSO MOBILE. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: LOSO MOBILE

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
